author: PranavViswanath
name: SP8192 + Gram-NS + Polar Express + 3-Layer Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + QK-Gain 5.25 + Legal Score-First TTT
technique_summary: SP8192 + Gram-NS (Gram-matrix Newton-Schulz for rectangular weights) + Polar Express per-iteration minimax NS coefficients + 4 NS steps + 3-Layer Depth Recurrence (L3-5) + Parallel Residuals (L7+) + QK-Gain 5.25 + EMA 0.9965 + WD 0.095 + Score-First TTT (SGD 3ep) + GPTQ SDClip + Brotli

attribution.gram_ns: Zhang, Amsel, Chen & Dao — Dao AI Lab (2026)
